specific_mechanism: Cheeger isoperimetric-based functional on existing parameter
llm_application: Compute Cheeger isoperimetric-based functional (using graph Laplacian structure) on existing learnable parameter (attention head importance, singular values, gradient norm); rank heads/values by this functional; prune or regularize the lowest 30%
classifier_evidence: llm_application is a functional/ranking on existing learnable parameter; no new module/connection/topology change
